diagrams.title: Pass by Value vs Pass by Reference
diagrams.description: Shows how data flows in both parameter passing techniques
elements: Original Variable in Pass by Value
Address Passed in Pass by Reference
Original Variable Modified in Pass by Reference
diagrams.purpose: Understand the fundamental difference between pass by value and pass by reference in C

diagrams.title: Array Passing Mechanism
diagrams.description: Illustrates how arrays decay to pointers when passed to functions
diagrams.purpose: Visualize why array modifications in functions affect the original array

diagrams.title: Pointer and Address Relationship
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between variable, address, and pointer
diagrams.purpose: Clarify how pointers store addresses and how dereferencing accesses values
